label: Active Participant (Pro-Iran)
description: Provided direct military, logistical, or intelligence support to Iran's attacks

label: Supports Iran
description: Explicitly endorsed or praised Iran's attacks as justified

label: Condemns Israel
description: Condemned Israel without explicitly endorsing Iran's strikes

label: Calls for De-escalation
description: Urged both sides to cease hostilities and pursue diplomacy

label: Neutral Acknowledgement
description: Acknowledged the conflict without taking a clear side

label: Silent / No Statement
description: No public statement or position found

label: Condemns Iran
description: Condemned Iran's attacks or called on Iran specifically to stop

label: Supports Israel
description: Explicitly backed Israel's right to self-defense or offered diplomatic/material support

label: Active Participant (Coalition)
description: Directly participated in intercepting Iranian munitions or provided active military defense
